Fit Mu Model

Source: R/fit_mu_model.R
fit_mu_model.Rd

Function to filter the data to the desired component using the variable c and fit survreg to the data using a formula supplied by the user, typically passed in through the EM algorithm

Usage

fit_mu_model(possible_data, pred_comp, mu_formula, maxiter_survreg = 30)

Arguments

possible_data

data frame iterated on by the EM algorithm, should contain left_bound, right_bound, c, P(C=c|y,t), and any covariates, such as time, e.g. "t"

pred_comp

numeric variable, which component is this model being fitted to, e.g. 2

mu_formula

formula being used to fit the model for mu, should contain a Surv object for an outcome and any covariates of interest, accepts pspline and other arguments to survreg

maxiter_survreg

maximum number of iterations for survreg to fit the model
